category_sources: Official GitHub README describes yubikey-agent as a seamless ssh-agent for YubiKeys.
source_facts.description says it is a seamless ssh-agent for YubiKeys and other PIV tokens.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface with installation, setup, and advanced topics.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/FiloSottile/yubikey-agent; repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README documents SSH_AUTH_SOCK setup and YubiKey-backed keys.
source_facts.description identifies ssh-agent, YubiKey, and PIV token functionality.
